steps.t: Braiglinn is at Imlad Lalaith, on the shores of the Anduin, in Lothlórien. You have been told to speak with Braiglinn about the crossing of the Golden…
Alfirimbes is waiting to speak with you in Echad Sirion. The Elves have established their foothold on the dark shores of Mirkwood and are ready to beg…
